title: CIA Files Prove Military Secretly Tracked Antigravity Tech While Mocking UFO Witnesses
description: Newly released CIA files and Pentagon records are fuelling claims that the US military secretly tracked antigravity technology and 'orb-like intelligences' while dismissing UFO sightings in public.

title: 'Can you see ALIENS?': UFO FILES 3.0 'reveal' new MYSTERIOUS orb encounters across America
description: The mystery surrounding UFOs and Unidentified Anomalous Phenomena (UAPs) is back in the spotlight after the Trump administration released a third batch of declassified government records. The latest disclosure includes 53 documents, 10 digital renderings, six videos, and three audio recordings gathered from multiple federal agencies.

title: Pentagon’s third UFO release has fish-scaled potatoes and red orbs. Still no aliens
description: One was a rotating disc that sent out beams of light. Another was a shining red orb of a hue the observer had never seen before. Then there was the one compared to a potato, and also a bean, but with a coat of shimmering, fish-like scales. Those were some of the UFOs described in documents...

title: Pentagon releases new UFO files, including videos of mysterious objects in Northeast
Pentagon’s third UFO release has fish-scaled potatoes and red orbs. Still no aliens
description: The 72 new files — including a 2022 Fort Carson sighting of a shimmering "potato" above Cheyenne Mountain — bring the total to 300 documents released.
